cycle_reasoning: Cycle 12. CTO has a significant backlog of P0/P1 tasks, including critical API mock replacements (#524-#527) and Supabase migration (#496). I am giving CTO maximum turns to clear this. QA is assigned to validate changes. Product is assigned to track the roadmap. Designer is assigned to finalize the Design System specs (#531) to prevent the CTO from building on ambiguous designs. Marketing is assigned per the 4-cycle cadence to refine content/SEO.
